channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ruth Madeley on disability representation and her new role in 'The Rapture'
item.description: Ruth Madeley, a British actress and disability campaigner, discusses her role in the BBC series 'The Rapture' and her journey in the entertainment industry. The show, an adaptation of Liz Jensen's nov...

item.title: CN Railway Workers Escape Wildfires on Foot as Regulators Investigate Incident
item.description: Federal regulators are investigating why Canadian National Railway (CN) workers had to flee wildfires on foot in Northwestern Ontario. A CN train crew was forced to abandon their locomotive when it wa...

item.title: PML-N Leader Condemns JUI-F Chief's Remarks on Army Martyrs, Calls for Reconsideration
item.description: PML-N leader Shahbaz Gill criticized JUI-F chief Fazlur Rehman's remarks about army martyrs, calling them 'inappropriate' and emphasizing that such statements could harm national unity. Gill argued th...

item.title: Kenyan Chef Anne Marie Shares Emotional Reunion with South African Actress Lindani in Maldives
item.description: Kenyan chef Anne Marie, known for her culinary skills, shared a heartfelt moment after unexpectedly meeting South African actress Luyanda Zwane, aka Lindani, while vacationing in the Maldives. The enc...

item.title: Childhood Memories of a Mother and Gangster
item.description: The text is a personal memoir reflecting on the author's childhood experiences with her mother, who is described as a 'gangster' in the title. It captures the complex relationship between a daughter a...

item.title: Public Protector Exposes Systemic Failures in Spaza Shop Food Safety Oversight
item.description: The Public Protector's investigation into spaza shops revealed severe lapses in food safety and hygiene enforcement across Gauteng. Over 72% of spaza shops failed to comply with regulations, with insp...

item.title: Cameroon's Illegal Gold Mining: Challenges and Losses
item.description: The article investigates the challenges Cameroon faces in its gold mining sector, highlighting how illegal activities and corruption are causing significant financial losses. Located in the East Regio...

item.title: ASIC warns of surge in 'pump-and-dump' scams targeting Australians
item.description: The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has issued a stark warning about a surge in sophisticated 'pump-and-dump' scams, where scammers use fake images of experts to lure victims i...

item.title: Federal Govt Launches Health and Education Reforms with $1.07 Billion Investment
item.description: The Nigerian federal government has unveiled a $1.07 billion initiative aimed at strengthening primary healthcare centres (PHCs), improving education systems, and enhancing governance structures. The ...

item.title: Senator Robin Padilla and PCG Official Clash Over China's AI-Generated Video Allegations
item.description: Senator Robin Padilla accused Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) spokesperson Jay Tarriela of escalating a 'wartime propaganda' conflict after a viral video from Chinese state media portrayed Filipinos as m...

item.title: The Disparity Between Animation's Financial Success and Industry Respect in Hollywood
item.description: The article explores the paradox of Hollywood's reliance on animation for box office success while failing to recognize its artistic value. Despite hits like 'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie' and 'Toy St...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates with Infrastructure Strikes and Regional Retaliations
item.description: The United States has intensified its military actions against Iran, targeting critical infrastructure such as road bridges in southern Iran. This escalation comes amid a sixth consecutive day of host...

item.title: PDP Selects Aminu Zakari as Running Mate for 2027 Taraba Governorship Bid
item.description: Senator Emmanuel Bwacha, the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) governorship candidate for Taraba State in the 2027 election, has officially named Aminu Zakari as his running mate. The decision was made a...

item.title: Burundi and Tanzania Collaborate on Medical Tourism Expansion
item.description: Burundi has identified Benjamin Mkapa Hospital in Tanzania as a key destination for specialized medical care, marking a significant step in regional healthcare collaboration. The decision follows incr...

item.title: Ombudsman Clarifies No Targeting of Senate Minority in Justice Probe
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman, led by Jesus Crispin Remulla, clarified that it is not targeting the new Senate minority bloc in its investigation into obstruction of justice complaints. Remulla emphasiz...

item.title: Refugees Targeted in Xenophobic Attack in Durban
item.description: Six refugees working in salons at Durban's Warwick Street Market were attacked and beaten by a group of men wielding sticks on 14 July 2026. Two victims required hospitalization, while four others sus...

item.title: Kenyan Woman's Husband Allegedly Misused Cancer Treatment Funds
item.description: Lydia Wambui, a mother of three from Kenya, alleges her pastor husband misused funds raised for her cancer treatment. Diagnosed with thyroid cancer in 2020, Lydia says she endured years of mistreatmen...

item.title: Persistent Orange Air Quality Warning in GTA with Temporary Afternoon Relief
item.description: Environment Canada has issued an orange-level air quality warning for the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) on Friday, with temporary relief anticipated in the afternoon before heavy smoke returns later in t...

item.title: Reform UK faces potential £3m tax liability over Farage's £5m donation
item.description: A tax expert has claimed that Reform UK could face a potential £3m tax liability due to Nigel Farage's undeclared £5m donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne. The controversy arises afte...

item.title: United Airlines Investigates Employee After Video Shows Agent Threatening Passenger With ICE
item.description: United Airlines is investigating an incident at San Francisco International Airport after a video circulated online showing a customer service agent telling a passenger that she might call U.S. Immigr...
